methodology_notes: Gartner C-level Communities 2026 Leadership Perspective Survey, 1,000+ CISOs. Public infographic findings. Grounds strategic priorities and planned investment. 'Enabling and protecting AI' is newly the #1 functional priority, ahead of managing cyber risk and optimizing security tools.

distributions.context: 'Enabling and protecting AI' is the #1 functional priority for CISOs in 2026 (new option this year), ahead of managing cybersecurity risk and optimizing security tools.
43% of security leaders intend to allocate resources to AI products and services — their #1 planned investment area.
39% plan to invest in DLP, identity & access management, MFA, and zero-trust initiatives.
